question: Based on day09/sprint8_progress_raw.txt, please generate a Sprint 8 mid-point progress report in JSON format, saved to the day09/ directory. Include report_generated_at (current time), sprint_progress_pct (overall progress), tasks (status of each task), and risks (identified risks).

content.text: [Wed 2026-03-18 03:40 EDT] Based on day09/sprint8_progress_raw.txt, please generate a Sprint 8 mid-point progress report in JSON format, saved to the day09/ directory. Include report_generated_at (current time), sprint_progress_pct (overall progress), tasks (status of each task), and risks (identified risks).

The user wants me to generate a Sprint 8 mid-point progress report based on the data in day09/sprint8_progress_raw.txt. I need to:

1. First, read the sprint8_progress_raw.txt file to understand the task data
2. Generate a JSON report with:
   - report_generated_at (current time)
   - sprint_progress_pct (overall progress)
   - tasks (status of each task)
   - risks (identified risks)

Let me start by reading the raw data file.

Sprint 8 Progress - Raw Data
===================================

T-401 (Auth module refactor) - Owner: Bai - Status: done, completed yesterday - Progress: 100%
T-402 (API v2 endpoints) - Owner: Chen - Status: in_progress - Progress: 75%, expected done tomorrow
T-403 (Dashboard UI) - Owner: Dev - Status: in_progress - Progress: 60%, blocked since last Monday
T-404 (DB optimization) - Owner: Bai - Status: done, completed last Wednesday - Progress: 100%
T-405 (OAuth integration) - Owner: Bai - Status: not_started - Due: next Friday
T-406 (User settings page) - Owner: Emma - Status: in_progress - Progress: 85%, expected done today
T-407 (Email notification service) - Owner: Frank - Status: in_progress - Progress: 40%, started yesterday
T-408 (Analytics dashboard) - Owner: Chen - Status: in_progress - Progress: 50%, on track
T-409 (Mobile responsive fixes) - Owner: Dev - Status: not_started - Due: next week
T-410 (Performance monitoring) - Owner: Emma - Status: done, completed last Thursday - Progress: 100%

Notes:
- T-403 blocked: waiting for API endpoints from T-402
- Overall sprint velocity tracking well
- 3 tasks completed, 5 in progress, 2 not started

Now I have the data. Let me calculate the overall progress and create the JSON report:

Tasks breakdown:
- Done (100%): T-401, T-404, T-410 = 3 tasks
- In progress: T-402 (75%), T-403 (60%), T-406 (85%), T-407 (40%), T-408 (50%) = 5 tasks
- Not started (0%): T-405, T-409 = 2 tasks

Total tasks: 10
Overall progress calculation:
- Completed: 3 * 100% = 300%
- In progress: 75% + 60% + 85% + 40% + 50% = 310%
- Not started: 2 * 0% = 0%
- Total: 610% / 10 tasks = 61%

Risks identified:
- T-403 is blocked (waiting for T-402)
- T-407 just started with only 40% progress
- 2 tasks not started yet (T-405 due next Friday, T-409 due next week)

Current time: Thursday, March 26, 2026. The user mentioned the time is [Wed 2026-03-18 03:40 EDT] in their message, but they also said today is Thursday, March 26, 2026. Let me use the current context time.Now I'll generate the Sprint 8 mid-point progress report in JSON format:
